cases.title: Renew the team domain name
cases.summary: The shared dev domain expires next month; renew for two years.

cases.title: Plan the Q3 team offsite
cases.summary: Pick dates + venue for a two-day planning offsite.

labels.title: Waiting on someone
labels.description: Apply when the next step is owned by another person and you are stalled until they reply, deliver, or decide.

labels.title: Blocked
labels.description: Apply when work cannot proceed because of a missing dependency, access, decision, or unresolved problem.

labels.title: At risk
labels.description: Apply when a deadline, commitment, or outcome is in jeopardy and will slip or fail without intervention.

labels.title: Needs a decision
labels.description: Apply when the demand is stuck pending a choice you must make before anything else can move forward.

labels.title: Deep work
labels.description: Apply when the task requires a long, uninterrupted focus block rather than a quick reactive reply.

labels.title: Quick win
labels.description: Apply when the task can be fully finished in a few minutes with little effort or context.

labels.title: Delegated
labels.description: Apply when you have handed the work off to someone else and are only tracking it to completion.

labels.title: Follow-up
labels.description: Apply when this is a reminder to circle back, chase a reply, or check in on something already in motion.

labels.title: Scheduled
labels.description: Apply when the item is locked to a specific date or time, like a meeting, appointment, or hard-dated commitment.

labels.title: Snoozed / deferred
labels.description: Apply when the item is intentionally parked until a later date and should not resurface or be acted on before then.

labels.title: Reference / saved
labels.description: Apply when the item is kept for lookup or context rather than action, such as a doc, link, or saved detail.

labels.title: Approval needed
labels.description: Apply when a request awaits your manager sign-off, such as a PR, expense, contract, PTO request, or access grant.

labels.title: 1-1 prep
labels.description: Apply when the item is preparing for, scheduling, or following up on a recurring 1-1 with a direct report.

labels.title: Time off / coverage
labels.description: Apply when a report requests PTO, sick, or parental leave, or you must arrange coverage for someone away.

labels.title: Hiring
labels.description: Apply when the item is a job req, candidate review, interview, debrief, or offer for an open role on your team.

labels.title: Performance
labels.description: Apply when the item involves a review cycle, calibration, promotion case, PIP, or feedback you must give a report.

labels.title: Team blocker
labels.description: Apply when a report is stuck and needs you to unblock them, remove a dependency, or make a call to keep work moving.

labels.title: Escalation
labels.description: Apply when a stakeholder, exec, or customer escalates an issue to you that demands a same-day response or resolution.

labels.title: People issue
labels.description: Apply when the item concerns interpersonal conflict, morale, attrition risk, or an HR-sensitive matter on your team.

labels.title: Budget / headcount
labels.description: Apply when the item touches team budget, vendor spend, headcount planning, or a forecast you own.

labels.title: Appointment
labels.description: Apply when the item is scheduling, confirming, rescheduling, or preparing for a doctor, dentist, specialist, or therapy visit.

labels.title: Prescription
labels.description: Apply when the item involves refilling, picking up, renewing, or adjusting a medication or a pharmacy request.

labels.title: Test results
labels.description: Apply when lab work, imaging, screenings, or other clinical results have arrived and need review or follow-up action.

labels.title: Symptom / concern
labels.description: Apply when a new or worsening symptom, injury, or acute health worry needs assessment or a same-week medical decision.

labels.title: Preventive care
labels.description: Apply when the item is a routine physical, dental cleaning, vaccination, or recommended screening that is due or overdue.

labels.title: Insurance / billing
labels.description: Apply when the item is a medical bill, claim, pre-authorization, EOB, or coverage question to pay or dispute.

labels.title: Fitness
labels.description: Apply when the item is a workout plan, training session, class booking, or physical-activity goal to schedule or log.

labels.title: Mental health
labels.description: Apply when the item relates to a therapy session, mood, stress, sleep, or a mindfulness or self-care practice to act on.

labels.title: Nutrition
labels.description: Apply when the item is about meal planning, dietary changes, supplements, or tracking food and hydration.

labels.title: Care coordination
labels.description: Apply when the item involves managing care for a dependent or coordinating referrals, records, or providers across parties.

labels.title: Bill to pay
labels.description: Apply when an invoice, statement, or payment request has arrived and money must be sent or scheduled by a due date.

labels.title: Renewal due
labels.description: Apply when a subscription, membership, licence, passport, or domain is expiring and must be renewed or cancelled.

labels.title: Insurance
labels.description: Apply when the item concerns a policy, quote, claim, or coverage change for home, auto, health, life, or contents.

labels.title: Appointment
labels.description: Apply when something needs a slot booked, confirmed, or rescheduled: doctor, dentist, vet, salon, viewing, or service.

labels.title: Form to file
labels.description: Apply when a form, application, or government/school/bank submission must be completed and sent to meet a deadline.

labels.title: Document needed
labels.description: Apply when you must locate, request, scan, sign, or file a document like a contract, certificate, or proof of address.

labels.title: Delivery / return
labels.description: Apply when a parcel, order, or shipment needs tracking, collecting, accepting at home, or returning.

labels.title: Repair / upkeep
labels.description: Apply when something at home is broken or due for maintenance and needs a tradesperson, part, or scheduled service.

labels.title: Utilities / account
labels.description: Apply when setting up, switching, disputing, or changing an account with a utility, telecom, bank, or service provider.

labels.title: Warranty / dispute
labels.description: Apply when chasing a refund, warranty repair, overcharge, or billing error with a vendor or service.

labels.title: Bill due
labels.description: Apply when a bill, loan payment, or invoice has a hard due date and risks a late fee or service cutoff if missed.

labels.title: Tax filing
labels.description: Apply when the item is filing returns, quarterly estimates, deductions, document collection, or any tax-deadline task.

labels.title: Fraud or dispute
labels.description: Apply when reviewing a suspicious charge, disputing a transaction, freezing a card, or responding to a breach alert.

labels.title: Budget review
labels.description: Apply when reconciling accounts, categorizing spend, or checking whether spending is on track against the budget.

labels.title: Subscription audit
labels.description: Apply when a recurring subscription or membership is renewing, raising its price, or up for a cancel/keep decision.

labels.title: Debt paydown
labels.description: Apply when the task is paying down or refinancing a credit card, loan, or mortgage, or weighing a payoff strategy.

labels.title: Invest & rebalance
labels.description: Apply when reviewing a portfolio, rebalancing allocations, deciding a buy/sell, or acting on a market-driven move.

labels.title: Retirement & savings
labels.description: Apply when funding a 401k/IRA, hitting a contribution or match deadline, or moving money into savings.

labels.title: Big purchase
labels.description: Apply when researching, saving for, or deciding on a major one-off purchase like a car, home, appliance, or trip.

labels.title: Insurance & coverage
labels.description: Apply when an insurance policy is renewing, a claim is in flight, or coverage needs to be compared or updated.

labels.title: Account admin
labels.description: Apply for routine financial paperwork: opening/closing accounts, updating beneficiaries, statements, or KYC requests.

labels.title: Flight booking
labels.description: Apply when the demand is to search, choose, book, or change a flight: fares, seats, layovers, or award redemptions.

labels.title: Lodging
labels.description: Apply when the demand is to find, book, modify, or cancel a place to stay like a hotel, Airbnb, or hostel.

labels.title: Ground transport
labels.description: Apply when arranging on-the-ground travel: rental car, train, ferry, airport transfer, or rideshare.

labels.title: Itinerary
labels.description: Apply when building or adjusting the day-by-day plan: routes, daily schedule, reservations, and activity sequencing.

labels.title: Visa & entry
labels.description: Apply when the task involves a visa, ESTA/eTA, passport validity, vaccination proof, or any border-entry requirement.

labels.title: Trip deadline
labels.description: Apply when an item is time-locked by departure or a booking window like check-in opening, a fare hold, or a refund cutoff.

labels.title: Packing
labels.description: Apply when the demand is to prepare what to bring: a packing list, gear, luggage limits, clothing, or chargers/adapters.

labels.title: Travel docs
labels.description: Apply when gathering or storing confirmations, boarding passes, e-tickets, reservation numbers, and insurance details.

labels.title: Trip budget
labels.description: Apply when the item concerns trip money: setting a budget, comparing prices, expense splitting, currency, or shared costs.

labels.title: Destination research
labels.description: Apply when researching a place before committing: things to do, neighborhoods, dates/seasons, safety, or local logistics.

labels.title: Urgent repair
labels.description: Apply when something is broken in a way that risks safety, damage, or livability and needs fixing now, like a leak or no heat.

labels.title: Routine repair
labels.description: Apply when a non-urgent fix-it task comes in for something worn, loose, or partly broken that can wait until convenient.

labels.title: Appliance
labels.description: Apply when the demand concerns a household appliance or system like the fridge, washer, boiler, or HVAC needing service.

labels.title: Contractor & quotes
labels.description: Apply when you need to find, vet, schedule, quote, or pay a tradesperson like a plumber, electrician, or handyman.

labels.title: Renovation project
labels.description: Apply when the item is part of a larger multi-step home improvement effort like a kitchen redo, repaint, or new flooring.

labels.title: Cleaning & chores
labels.description: Apply when the task is recurring upkeep or deep cleaning: decluttering, laundry, scrubbing, or booking a cleaner.

labels.title: Garden & outdoor
labels.description: Apply when the demand involves the yard, garden, lawn, plants, or exterior like the patio, fence, gutters, or driveway.

labels.title: Seasonal upkeep
labels.description: Apply when it is preventive, calendar-driven maintenance like winterizing pipes, servicing the furnace, or swapping filters.

labels.title: Supplies & shopping
labels.description: Apply when you need to buy, order, return, or restock materials, tools, parts, or furnishings for the home.

labels.title: Move & logistics
labels.description: Apply when the task relates to moving, packing, storage, deliveries, or transferring utilities and home services.

labels.title: Home admin
labels.description: Apply when it is paperwork or recurring obligations for the home: insurance, property tax, HOA dues, warranties, or permits.

labels.title: Kids logistics
labels.description: Apply when the demand involves a child's schedule, transport, pickups, activities, playdates, or daily care coordination.

labels.title: School
labels.description: Apply when the item concerns school: forms, permission slips, teacher messages, meetings, tuition, homework, or enrollment.

labels.title: Partner
labels.description: Apply when the demand is about your spouse or partner: shared decisions, date plans, their asks, or relationship check-ins.

labels.title: Parents & elders
labels.description: Apply when the item concerns aging parents or older relatives: their needs, requests, visits, or coordinating help.

labels.title: Caregiving
labels.description: Apply when the demand is hands-on care for a dependent: meds, appointments, doctor coordination, or arranging caregivers.

labels.title: Health appointment
labels.description: Apply when the item is booking, prepping for, or following up on a medical, dental, or wellness visit for a family member.

labels.title: Social plans
labels.description: Apply when the demand is organizing or responding to get-togethers with friends or family: dinners, trips, or hosting.

labels.title: Celebration
labels.description: Apply when the item is a birthday, anniversary, holiday, gift, card, or party that needs planning or remembering.

labels.title: Household
labels.description: Apply when the demand is running the shared home: chores, repairs, groceries, bills, or coordinating contractors.

labels.title: Stay in touch
labels.description: Apply when someone deserves a reach-out you owe: a friend you've lost touch with, a thank-you, or an overdue reply.

labels.title: Family tension
labels.description: Apply when the item is a sensitive conflict, disagreement, or hard conversation with a family member or friend.

labels.title: Course
labels.description: Apply when the demand is enrolling in, watching lectures for, or completing assignments in a structured course or class.

labels.title: Reading list
labels.description: Apply when something is a book, article, or paper to read or finish, including a recommendation to add to the queue.

labels.title: Skill practice
labels.description: Apply when the task is a repeatable practice session to drill a skill like an instrument, language, code kata, or drawing.

labels.title: Hobby project
labels.description: Apply when working on a personal creative or maker project pursued for enjoyment like a side build, craft, or game.

labels.title: Certification
labels.description: Apply when the item is preparing for, scheduling, or sitting an exam or credential, or renewing one that is expiring.

labels.title: Deadline / cohort
labels.description: Apply when a learning item has a hard external date: an application window, assignment due date, or cohort start.

labels.title: Mentor / coach
labels.description: Apply when scheduling or prepping for a session with a teacher, coach, mentor, or study partner, or acting on feedback.

labels.title: Notes & review
labels.description: Apply when the task is capturing notes, summarizing what you learned, or revisiting flashcards or material for retention.

labels.title: Tools & resources
labels.description: Apply when buying, renewing, or setting up the gear, software, subscription, or supplies needed to learn or practice.

labels.title: Goal & milestone
labels.description: Apply when setting, tracking, or reflecting on a learning goal, streak, or growth milestone rather than a single task.

labels.title: Renewal coming up
labels.description: Apply when a subscription or plan is about to auto-renew or just billed and you must decide to keep, downgrade, or cancel.

labels.title: Cancel before trial
labels.description: Apply when a free trial or promo is ending and you must cancel or opt out before it converts to a paid charge.

labels.title: Price change
labels.description: Apply when a service announces a price rise or plan change so you can reassess whether it is still worth keeping.

labels.title: Account security
labels.description: Apply when there is a suspicious login, breach notice, leaked-password alert, or a 2FA/MFA setup to lock down an account.

labels.title: Password & login fix
labels.description: Apply when you need to reset, rotate, or store a password, recover account access, or clean up your password manager.

labels.title: Device & hardware
labels.description: Apply when a phone, laptop, or device needs setup, repair, replacement, an OS update, or a warranty/insurance action.

labels.title: Backup & storage
labels.description: Apply when cloud storage is full, a backup failed or is overdue, or you must verify photos or files are safely synced.

labels.title: Privacy & data
labels.description: Apply when adjusting privacy or tracking settings, handling a data-deletion or unsubscribe, or a consent/terms update.

labels.title: Unused subscription
labels.description: Apply when you spot a subscription you no longer use, a duplicate service, or overlapping plans worth consolidating.

labels.title: Billing dispute
labels.description: Apply when wrongly charged, owed a refund, hit by a failed payment, or needing to fix a card or billing error.

labels.title: Application
labels.description: Apply when a job needs a tailored application, resume, cover letter, or submission before its closing date.

labels.title: Lead / opening
labels.description: Apply when a new role, posting, or opportunity is spotted and needs reviewing or saving to pursue.

labels.title: Interview
labels.description: Apply when an interview must be scheduled, prepped for, attended, or followed up on with a thank-you.

labels.title: Networking
labels.description: Apply when a contact, referral, intro, or coffee chat could advance the search and needs a reach-out.

labels.title: Offer / decision
labels.description: Apply when an offer arrives and needs evaluating, negotiating, comparing, or accepting or declining.

labels.title: Materials / profile
labels.description: Apply when resume, portfolio, LinkedIn, or other application materials need creating, updating, or polishing.

labels.title: Deadline
labels.description: Apply when an application window, assessment, or response is time-locked and risks closing if missed.
